entry.title: MOSS-TTS Local Transformer v1.5 on SGLang-Omni: Serving Native-Streaming 48 kHz Speech

MOSS-TTS-Local-Transformer-v1.5 is an open TTS model for 48 kH...

entry.title: No Token Left Behind: Demystifying Token-In-Token-Out in Miles
entry.summary: In agentic RL, a rollout is not a single generation. It is a chain of model calls, tool outputs, harness messages, and resumed generations. Token-In-Token-Out (TITO) is a design principle that address...

entry.summary: We introduced a RDMA-based, Peer to Peer weight update mechanism for RL workloads in SGLang as a supplement to traditional NCCL broadcast methods, compatible with all major open source models. By util...

entry.title: HiSparse: Turbocharging Sparse Attention with Hierarchical Memory
entry.summary: Self-attention has become a major bottleneck in scaling LLMs to long contexts because of its quadratic compute and memory/IO cost. This has driven growing interest in efficient attention mechanisms. A...
